title: Faceting a thrown cylinder form
notes: Altering a leather-hard thrown cylinder into a faceted form by pressing a flat rib or wooden paddle against the wall from outside while supporting inside with a hand. Creates six or eight flat panels around the circumference. Technique applied at leather-hard for clean panel edges. Explains timing (too wet = panel slumps, too dry = cracks), and how to trim the foot ring after faceting.
